caption_style: WAYS creator captions; zero non-caption text

shots.caption: A frog can freeze solid
shots.visual: real wood frog on leaf litter with icy edge, instant animal read

shots.voiceover: In winter, ice can form through much of its body.
shots.caption: ice forms through its body
shots.visual: macro frost creeping around frog body, no horror, no labels

shots.voiceover: Its heart can stop beating for a while.
shots.caption: its heart can stop
shots.visual: calm freeze-state close-up with subtle pulse fading, no medical UI

shots.voiceover: Sugar-like antifreeze helps protect the cells.
shots.caption: sugar helps protect cells
shots.visual: simple cellular protection visual without text or diagram labels

shots.voiceover: Then spring warms it up, and the frog starts moving again.
shots.caption: spring warms it / back to life
shots.visual: thawing frog on wet leaves, tiny visible movement
